description.ko: 미시적이면서도 거대한 규모의 유기적 생명체를 표현하며, 살아있는 네트워크를 통해 흐르는 에너지의 흐름에 집중합니다.
description.en: A representation of organic life at a microscopic yet monumental scale, focusing on the flow of energy through a living network.

prompt: An ultra-detailed cinematic 3D render of AURA-7, titled 'The Neural Oasis.' A vast, pulsating vascular network composed of #7FB069 emerald moss-like textures and #2D5A3D deep forest capillaries. The entity is suspended in a weightless #E6F2E1 pearlescent liquid atmosphere, exhaling viscous #FFE66D golden bioluminescent nectar that flows like rhythmic liquid silk. Macro focus on the semi-permeable translucent walls revealing complex internal neural pathways of glowing sap. Rendered in Octane with hyper-realistic fluid dynamics, volumetric light shafts, and extreme soft focus bokeh. 8k resolution.
